title: callicarpa bodinieri var. iteophylla
intro: Callicarpa bodinieri var. iteophylla, also known as Purple Stemmed Callicarpa, is a shrub-like plant in the Lamiaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Indian Ayurvedic medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Callicarpa bodinieri var. iteophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are traditionally used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal concoctions.
